_scenario: B001 — Hospitalisation (Community-Acquired Pneumonia, 4 days), COMP-HEALTH-GOLD, Self, FULLY APPROVED
_outcome: All 6 nodes pass. Disbursed SGD 12,825.00 via direct_credit (DBS) T+3.

document_summary.summary_narrative: Tan Wei Ming, 47, admitted to Singapore General Hospital on 10 Apr 2025 with community-acquired pneumonia (ICD-10 J18.9). Symptoms (fever, productive cough) first noted 7 Apr 2025. Treatment included inpatient physician consultations (CPT 99232), chest X-ray (CPT 71046), and IV antibiotics over a 4-day stay. Discharged 14 Apr 2025. Total billed SGD 18,500 including ward, physician, diagnostics, and medications. Pre-authorisation PA-2025-110001 submitted.

_db_lookups.policies_query: SELECT policy_status, policy_start_date, policy_expiry_date, policy_product_code, premium_payment_mode FROM policies WHERE policy_no = 'HIC-2024-00123'
_db_lookups.identity_query: SELECT relationship, dependent_status FROM policy_members WHERE policy_no='HIC-2024-00123' AND id_document_type='nric' AND id_document_no='S7801234A'
_db_lookups.arrears_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM premium_ledger WHERE policy_no='HIC-2024-00123' AND due_date<='2025-04-10' AND payment_status='unpaid'
_db_lookups.duplicate_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM claims WHERE policy_no='HIC-2024-00123' AND incident_date='2025-04-10' AND claim_type='hospitalisation' AND status IN ('pending','approved','paid')

_plan_document_lookup.query: SELECT plan_document FROM plan_documents WHERE policy_product_code='COMP-HEALTH-GOLD' AND claim_type='hospitalisation'

_computation.annual_utilised_query: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(net_payable),0) FROM claim_utilisation WHERE policy_no='HIC-2024-00123' AND claim_type='hospitalisation' AND benefit_year=2025 AND status IN ('paid','pending')

_output.eligibility_rationale: Claim type hospitalisation is covered under COMP-HEALTH-GOLD. Waiting period of 30 days satisfied (symptom onset 7 Apr 2025 is 812 days after policy inception 15 Jan 2024). J18.9 (Pneumonia) triggers no exclusion. Annual limit SGD 100,000 is fully available (SGD 0 utilised in 2025). Claimable ceiling SGD 18,500 (capped by claim amount).

provider_accreditation.result: Singapore General Hospital — Active, MOH-certified Acute General Hospital, scope Full Service, expiry 2027-12-31

provider_accreditation.provider_name_on_bill_match: Singapore General Hospital == Singapore General Hospital ✓

physician_licence.query: SMC Full Medical Register — lookup physician_license_no='MCR-10234A'
physician_licence.result: Dr. Chong Wei Liang — Active, Internal Medicine, expiry 2027-06-30
physician_licence.physician_licence_claim: Dr. Chong Wei Liang (MCR-10234A) holds a valid and active medical licence registered with the Singapore Medical Council under Internal Medicine. Licence verified at SMC Full Medical Register on 2025-04-14. Licence valid through 2027-06-30.

pre_auth_check.query: SELECT status, policy_no, authorised_amount, expiry_date FROM pre_authorisations WHERE pre_auth_no='PA-2025-110001'

rps_benchmark.query: SELECT SUM(unit_price) FROM rps_schedule WHERE cpt_code IN ('99232','71046') AND provider_type='hospital' AND setting='inpatient'

_coding_assessment.reasoning: CPT 99232 (subsequent hospital inpatient visit) is a valid active code. It is clinically plausible for ICD-10 J18.9 (Pneumonia, unspecified organism) — daily inpatient physician visits are standard management for pneumonia requiring hospitalisation.
CPT 71046 (radiologic examination, chest; 2 views) is a valid active code. It is clinically plausible for ICD-10 J18.9 — chest X-ray is a standard diagnostic and monitoring tool for pneumonia.

_output.accreditation_claim: Singapore General Hospital (MOH-HOSP-00142) is confirmed as an active, MOH-accredited acute general hospital with full-service certification scope. Registry verified at MOH accredited provider registry on 2025-04-14. Accreditation valid through 2027-12-31.
_output.physician_licence_claim: Dr. Chong Wei Liang (MCR-10234A) holds a valid and active medical licence registered with the Singapore Medical Council under Internal Medicine. Licence verified at SMC Full Medical Register on 2025-04-14. Licence valid through 2027-06-30.

coding_assessment.reasoning: CPT 99232 (subsequent hospital inpatient visit) is clinically plausible for ICD-10 J18.9 (Pneumonia) — standard daily inpatient physician management.
CPT 71046 (chest X-ray, 2 views) is clinically plausible for ICD-10 J18.9 — standard diagnostic and monitoring tool for pneumonia.

_output.medical_review_notes: Panel hospital SGH confirmed accredited. Dr. Chong Wei Liang SMC licence valid through 2027. CPT 99232 (inpatient visit) and CPT 71046 (chest X-ray) are clinically plausible for J18.9 pneumonia. Pre-auth PA-2025-110001 approved. Bill SGD 18,500 is 15.6% above RPS benchmark SGD 16,000 — within acceptable variance. Medical necessity confirmed.

_plan_document_lookup.query: SELECT plan_document FROM plan_documents WHERE policy_product_code='COMP-HEALTH-GOLD' AND claim_type='hospitalisation'
_plan_document_lookup.deductible_utilised_query: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount),0) FROM deductible_ledger WHERE policy_no='HIC-2024-00123' AND benefit_year=2025

_output.adjudication_notes: Adjudication base SGD 16,000 (RPS benchmark; bill SGD 18,500 capped). Annual deductible SGD 1,000 fully applied. Co-pay 5% = SGD 750. Co-insurance 10% = SGD 1,425 (below SGD 3,000 cap). Net payable SGD 12,825. Claimant liability SGD 5,675.

_output.remarks: Claim CLM-2025-0001101 approved. Adjudication base SGD 16,000 (RPS benchmark applied). Deductible SGD 1,000, co-pay 5%, co-insurance 10% applied. SGD 12,825 to be credited to DBS ****4567 by 17 Apr 2025 (T+3).
